content.en:
The Yuan Dao derives ten thousand paths, and the immeasurable Tao is born in the ten thousand paths.

This is the key to understanding the immeasurable path!

It seems that you understand everything, but in fact, if you want to do it, it seems that you don't know where to start, and it is really difficult!

"The Yuan Dao was originally derived from the Ten Thousand Daos, and then derived from the Yuan Dao, according to the Nine Fox Dao Ancestors, it is based on the Extreme Yuan Dao, deriving one after another, deducing and comprehending these Dao to a level comparable to the Extreme Yuan Dao, and then deriving and comprehending from these Dao again, so as to break the shackles of the Extreme Yuan Dao and comprehend the higher level of the Immeasurable Dao!"

Ye Tian muttered to himself.

Strictly speaking, the Infinite Dao is a high-end version of the Extreme Yuan Dao.

"For me, trying to comprehend the Immeasurable Dao is more advantageous than other Dao Ancestors!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He has a large number of Yuan Dao ancestral endowments, and he has a natural advantage in comprehending the Yuan Dao, and he can easily comprehend the Yuan Dao to the extreme realm.

Now, if you comprehend the Yuan Dao with the Extreme Endless Yuan Dao and improve many Yuan Dao, the difficulty will naturally be much easier.

In the following years, one of Ye Tian's replica bodies went all out to comprehend the Immeasurable Dao.

Because his talent is really too demonic, he can perceive his own slight progress, and compared to the other Yae Origin Ancestors who have not been able to feel progress for a long time, he can see hope.

And the other Yae Origin Ancestors have been practicing for countless years and have not seen any hope, so naturally they will not practice so seriously.

Ye Tian will not rely on himself to comprehend the immeasurable Dao, he will also use the treasures, treasures, and resources in the nine-story building to assist in the comprehension of the Yuan Dao, which can improve the effect of enlightenment.

100 million years of the Primordial Era!

Billion Primordial Era Years!

Tens of billions of years of the original domain!

Ye Tian has been cultivating penance, and nothing big has happened recently.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had already cultivated more than 30 billion years of the Origin Domain Era.

After such a long period of penance and enlightenment, Ye Tian evolved into many Daos comparable to the Extreme Yuan Dao, which were derived from the Endless Yuan Dao and attached to the Endless Yuan Dao, but they were extremely powerful.

In the beginning, it was really difficult to attain enlightenment, but in the later stages, it became much easier to evolve these paths.

It's just that the derivation of the Ten Thousand Daos is only the easiest step, and the derivation of the Immeasurable Dao from the Ten Thousand Paths is the most difficult step!

And now, Ye Tian is trying this step.

Many Eightfold Origin Ancestors have been cultivating for endless years, and their cultivation has been raised to the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestors, and they are even trapped in this step, and they have not even comprehended the threshold of the Infinite Path.

......

Truncate the Yellow Building.

In a place of time and space, Ye Tian sat cross-legged, and the endless power of the Dao continued to evolve around the surrounding time and space.

At this moment, Ye Tian seemed to have turned into the incarnation of the Endless Yuan Dao, and every particle in his body had turned into a part of the Endless Yuan Dao, all of which were constantly evolving.

He tried to derive a trace of immeasurable Dao aura from the many Daos.

And this step was enough for Ye Tian to comprehend the years of more than 50 billion Origin Domain Eras, and finally let Ye Tian get a glimpse of the breath of the Immeasurable Dao.

At this moment, Ye Tian derived a trace of the power of the Infinite Dao Prototype from the Ten Thousand Dao.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Although he only comprehended the power of the immeasurable Dao rudiment, he finally stepped into this level and had the qualifications to expand the immeasurable Dao rudiment.

Moreover, if you have comprehended the rudiments of the Immeasurable Path, you only need to silently comprehend it, and you can finally comprehend the true Immeasurable Path.

......

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The Nine-Fold Building is a special time and space, where Ye Tian is constantly testing his Supreme Yuan Dao control technique.

At this time, his Supreme Yuan Dao control technique had improved by a cut, and his power had increased greatly.

"Sure enough, just comprehending the rudiments of the Infinite Dao and blessing it on the Supreme Yuan Dao Control Technique, the power of these Supreme Yuan Dao Control Techniques skyrocketed!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

At this moment, his strength has improved a lot, which is faster than improving his cultivation to improve his combat power!

In these tens of billions of primordial realms, he has also been improving his cultivation, but his cultivation is still in the early stage of the eightfold primordial ancestor, and his life level has increased a little, but it is still far less than the combat power that has improved by comprehending the rudimentary form of the Infinite Dao.

But soon, Ye Tian discovered a problem, that is, the treasures or resources in the Nine-Fold Building that helped to accelerate the comprehension of the Yuan Dao could not be useful to him in the rudiments of the Enlightenment of the Immeasurable Dao.

"It seems that those places and treasure resources are too low-level for the Infinite Dao Prototype, but the Nine Stories Building must have places or treasures suitable for comprehending the Infinite Dao Prototype!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he went to investigate.

Soon, Ye Tian learned from the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor that even if it was a nine-story building, there were not many treasure lands suitable for the Dao Ancestor to comprehend the immeasurable Dao rudiments.

Moreover, those treasure lands have a quota limit, after all, even if those treasure lands can allow Dao Ancestors to comprehend the immeasurable Dao rudiments, but after a long time of enlightenment, it will still cause certain damage to those treasure lands.

In order to ensure the perpetuity of those treasures, it is necessary to limit the number of places to enter enlightenment.

Moreover, even if you go to enlightenment, you will need to spend millions of points.

Even if Ye Tian has a lot of points, with his current background, he won't be able to comprehend for long.

"Long Platinum Mountain!"

"Black Cloud Ancient Realm!"

"Cloud City!"

These are the three treasure places where the Eightfold Ancestor is currently allowed to attain enlightenment, and if you comprehend the rudiments of the Immeasurable Path, you can enter these three places to practice and attain enlightenment.

But now there are no vacant places, and Ye Tian can't get in even if he has points.

......

"Endless Dao Ancestor, you inquired about the treasure land of the Infinite Dao Prototype, could it be that you have already comprehended the Infinite Dao Prototype?"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded and said.

"Your speed of comprehending the rudiments of the Immeasurable Dao is too fast!!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor was shocked.

You must know that even if it was him, it was only after he became a half-step ninefold ancestor that he comprehended the rudiments of the Infinite Dao, and it took endless years and countless resources and treasures, and the price he paid was unimaginable.

Until now, he has not truly comprehended the immeasurable path, but he is not far from comprehending the true immeasurable path, and he is in the rudimentary form of the immeasurable path at the great completion level.

But Ye Tian, he comprehended the prototype of the Infinite Dao so quickly, although he had only initially comprehended it, he was still terrifying!

Suddenly.

Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said: "Endless Dao Ancestor, if you want to speed up the comprehension of the Infinite Dao Prototype, you can go to a certain treasure place in the Black Mountain, where you can accelerate the comprehension of the Infinite Dao Prototype, but the effect is average, for a Dao Ancestor like me, there is no effect." And there will be some dangers there that interfere with one's own enlightenment, and you also need to be guarded by a protector or doppelganger. You have only realized the rudiments of the Immeasurable Path, and that place is suitable for you. "

Subsequently, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor told Ye Tian the location of that treasure land.
